projects.title: Neon Blox agents
projects.description: trained agents to play Neon Blox (a Flood-It puzzle): random/greedy baselines, a genetic algorithm, PPO, beam-search planning, and a small net distilled from the planner. an interactive demo plays any seed live in-browser (distilled net forward pass and all). greedy wins 72%, beam search ~100%, and the distilled net 87% with no search at all.

projects.title: OnCue
projects.description: upload documents (resume, project docs, essays) -> in a call transcripts; questions are detected and used to query the database with rag and top 3 hits are shown

projects.title: RL Snake
projects.description: snake game AI trained with Q-Learning, Hamiltonian Paths, Deep Q Network, PPO, and A2C; attained near optimal performance on 4x4 and 6x6

projects.title: Sketch Classifier & Generator
projects.description: image classification for Quick, Draw! dataset using big CNNs (92% accuracy on 95-class dataset), and generating drawings using an RNN VAE with gaussian mixture models.

projects.title: Text Generation
projects.description: text generation models and experiments using RNNs (GRU and LSTM) and markov chains on shakespeare and code

projects.title: ML from Scratch
projects.description: after calling model.fit() too many times, got curious and built a neural network and backpropagation from scratch using fun matrix calculus and numpy.

sections.title: Bots
sections.description: A collection of game-playing AI bots I've developed.

projects.title: Connect 4 Bot
projects.description: A bot that plays Connect 4 using the minimax algorithm.

projects.title: Chess Bot
projects.description: first cs project: making a javascript chess bot from scratch that plays chess using the minimax algorithm with alpha-beta pruning; did some fun profiling using chrome dev tools

projects.title: Hex Bot
projects.description: A bot that plays the game of Hex using Monte Carlo Tree Search.

projects.title: Wordle Bot
projects.description: A bot that plays Wordle using a combination of letter frequency analysis and word list filtering.

projects.title: Set Bot
projects.description: Scripts that run in the JavaScript web browser that automate playing the game of Set.

projects.title: learn chess
projects.description: got to 2150 rapid rating in one year; just played a lot during lunch with friends and online; some tourney highlights: 1st/135 (u1600, perfect score) at us amateur team west, 3rd/75 at the 2023 sf scholastic championship, and a perfect-score win at a local bughouse tournament; learn (fast) by doing 🔥

projects.title: IPD Nueva
projects.description: A forked and higly optimized and improved version of the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma simulation created to run a tournament for a Microeconomics class.

projects.title: Break Those Blocks
projects.description: A game where players break blocks in a grid-based environment by shooting balls (currently doesnt work that well).

projects.title: Number Connections
projects.description: Instead of connections, connect the numbers! Like the NYT game.

projects.title: Fibonacci
projects.description: Various algorithms to compute Fibonacci numbers, including recursive, iterative, and matrix exponentiation methods.

projects.title: Rectangle Packing
projects.description: An algorithm to pack rectangles into a larger rectangle with zero wasted space.

sections.title: Electrical Engineering
sections.description: Embedded systems, circuits, and hardware builds.

projects.title: Databox
projects.description: with no ee experience made a pcb that uses esp32 to send numbers (knob potentiometers), audio (INMP441), and image (esp32 cam) data over wifi to a spreadsheet through google apps script

projects.title: Piano Culmination
projects.description: a culmination of 1.3 years of piano practice, featuring fallen down (toby fox), howl's moving castle + one summer day (joe hisaishi) and more!.

projects.title: Pause
projects.description: a native macOS break enforcer that actually locks you out; activate on app open, timers in menu bar, customize time and text, etc

projects.title: WorkableCafes
projects.description: find cafes with good WiFi, comfort, and power outlets to work from! worked on polishing the app and scraping data from reviews to generate actually accurate synthetic data

projects.title: Discord Friends Graph
projects.description: chrome extension that scans your discord friends list and renders mutual connections as an interactive graph. everything runs locally; you can export a self-contained shareable HTML and merge graphs with friends who also use it

sections.title: Self-Learning
sections.description: Things I taught myself outside of class.

projects.title: math speed learning
projects.description: spent 1 year learning all four years of high school math (self-taught 3): algebra 1, geometry, algebra 2, and precalc. to check & bolster understanding: AoPS precalc over the summer -> the next year taught the whole thing to a friend over 15 morning sessions.
